title: callista rotundata
intro: Callista rotundata, also known as the "Round-leaved Callista" or "Moon orchid", is a type of orchid native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Callista rotundata is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
